summary: Tested admin reviews page download functionality. Page loads correctly with 33 reviews, download buttons present on each row. However, clicking download fails due to CORS issue - external logo image cannot be loaded from customer-assets.emergentagent.com because the server doesn't send Access-Control-Allow-Origin headers. Error handling works correctly (shows 'Failed to load logo image' toast).

ui_bugs.issue: Logo image fails to load due to CORS - external URL https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/... doesn't support CORS headers required for canvas crossOrigin='anonymous'

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (cosmetic only - same as iteration 12)

action_items: Fix logo loading for review image download - options: 1) Use a local logo file from /public folder, 2) Proxy logo through backend, 3) Embed logo as base64 data URI, 4) Configure CORS on customer-assets server
critical_code_review_comments: The canvas-based image generation code is well-structured with proper error handling (onerror callback)
Issue: crossOrigin='anonymous' requires the server to send Access-Control-Allow-Origin headers, which customer-assets.emergentagent.com doesn't provide
Recommended fix: Store logo locally in /public folder and reference it as '/favicon.png' or similar relative path to avoid CORS issues

success_rate.frontend: 90% (page loads, buttons work, download fails due to external CORS)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin reviews page at /panelgsnadminbackend/reviews works correctly. Download button triggers canvas image generation but fails because external logo URL has CORS restrictions. Fix should use local logo file. Admin credentials: gsnadmin/gsnadmin.

Review list displays correctly with ratings, names, status badges - PASS
Review Reward settings section visible - PASS
Add Manual Review button visible - PASS

bug_details.error_shown_to_user: 'Failed to load logo image' toast notification
reproduction_steps: 3. Click the download button (Download icon) on any review row
4. Observe 'Failed to load logo image' toast error
